html:
European Commission, Daily News, Brussels, June 26, 2026. The EU is sending emergency aid to Venezuela following the earthquakes.

The European Commission is dispatching rescue teams and other urgent assistance to Venezuela...
tldr: The EU is sending rapid assistance and rescue teams to Venezuela following a series of powerful earthquakes.
lattlast:
The European Union, a union of countries in Europe, has decided to provide assistance to the people of Venezuela, who have been severely affected by major earthquakes.

This aid includes rescue teams and other essential equipment needed immediately after a disaster. The goal is to save lives and provide support to those affected.

The decision was made by the European Commission, which is the body responsible for managing the EU's day-to-day operations. The assistance is being sent to address the urgent situation in the country.
